title: The Boys (Corvallis crew)
html:
The Boys — Yahir's Corvallis-era friend group. Hosts beer ball tournaments, Chelympics, fantasy football leagues, takes road trips together. Recurring named members: Cam (Jipp), Riley, Owen, Cameron, Henry, Luke, Charis, Dove, Francis, Schlong, La Croix, Hemmy. Also: David, Drip, GSmitty, Dav.

Recurring activities documented

  • Beer Ball — Nov 2023 rulebook authored by Yahir.
  • Chelympics 2025 — May 2025 tournament (1 beer + 1 shot per person, 7 events).
  • Fantasy football league — annual tradition with $500 buy in.
  • Idaho trip, Kentucky trip, DC trip, Houston trip — per 2023 05 13 travel trip log.
  • House parties + the Paige incident — per 2024 01 05 thoughts on 1523 grey hairs paige.
  • OSU dorm + apartment leases — recurring rent / housing logistics in 2024 05 13 things pre asia trip and 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook.

Named members (with most-distinctive citation)

  • Cam (Jipp) — partner-in-crime, eventual Austin-move-non-mover.
  • Riley — recurring in dreams + breakup conversations.
  • Owen — "Gym Owen" per 2022 06 04 one time things habits; hospital-visits track in 2025.
  • Cameron — Kentucky trip co-traveler.
  • Charis — halftime ritual leader at Chelympics.
  • Dove, Francis, Schlong, La Croix — Chelympics 2025 team-name lineup.
  • David — grieving Vic per 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state.

Pattern

The Boys are Yahir's chosen-family / activation infrastructure through college. The friendships fray geographically post-Austin-move (Sept 2025: "My friends are in Corvallis. This is a new wrld") but not emotionally — Yahir keeps planning Bros visits + tracking Owen's hospital visits + drafting fantasy together.
